The '''''Poesy''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari light cruiser]].

==Characteristics==
Its armament consisted of 14 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], 18 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], 6 heavy [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors and powerful shields. It also was equipped with four [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]].

==History==
The ''Poesy'' was under the command of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Mabettye]] and served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]/[[Duro/Legends|Duros]] fleet at the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. During the battle the cruiser was destroyed by swarms of enemy [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] with its shields having been weakened throughout the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
